name: Publish Release (Generic Release)
description: Creates a GitHub release with any versioning scheme, attaches specified artifacts, and generates release notes.

artifact_names.description: Comma-separated list of artifact names to attach to the release

include_test_results.description: Include test results in release notes

commit_count.description: Number of recent commits to include

artifact_patterns.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for release assets (e.g., *.nupkg,docs/*.zip)

release_url.description: URL of the created GitHub release
